models.name: 2 Hz (Sleep)
models.description: Category: Sleep – 2 Hz delta – deep sleep, physical healing, immune support, unconscious restoration. Best for sleep and deep healing sessions.

models.name: 4 Hz (Imagination)
models.description: Category: Imagination – 4 Hz theta – deep meditation, creativity, intuition, memory recall, and visualization. Ideal for imagination and inner exploration practices.

models.name: 6 Hz (Vision)
models.description: Category: Future Vision – 6 Hz theta/alpha border – balance of deep relaxation and mental clarity. Supports intention-setting, future vision, and transformation exercises.

models.name: 10 Hz (Relaxation)
models.description: Category: Relaxation – 10 Hz alpha – calm focus, stress relief, light meditation, flow state. Perfect for relaxation and stress reduction practices.

models.name: 14 Hz (Focus)
models.description: Category: Focus – 14 Hz beta – alertness, concentration, mental clarity, problem-solving. Best for focus and productivity-oriented practices.

models.name: 40 Hz (Gratitude)
models.description: Category: Gratitude – 40 Hz gamma – cognitive enhancement, memory, compassion, higher awareness, peak states. Excellent for gratitude and heart-opening practices.
